items.title: Joe Mazzulla on navigating what some projected as gap-year for Celtics:
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Joe Mazzulla on navigating what some projected as gap-year for Celtics:

"It's two-fold, right? ...Regardless of what moves are made...We're gonna continue to stick to the process of winning...Our guys came in with a huge chip on their shoulder...wanting to get better every day."

items.title: As an aside, I see some derivative of “Should’ve traded Maxey instead of McCain”, “Should trade Maxey and build around Edgecombe” or some attempt to pit Maxey against Embiid online every week….let’s stop.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt: As an aside, I see some derivative of “Should’ve traded Maxey instead of McCain”, “Should trade Maxey and build around Edgecombe” or some attempt to pit Maxey against Embiid online every week….let’s stop.

items.title: Joel Embiid discusses leadership, growth of Sixers' young backcourt
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Joel Embiid discusses leadership, growth of Sixers' young backcourt Yahoo Sports

items.title: There’s also the context of yet another trade to duck the tax after Embiid basically called out ownership about it, plus the failure to replace him to help the team this season when allegedly trying to compete. The actual trade value is fine but overall just looks bad.
items.author: Jason Patt

items.title: [Highlight] Jay Williams says he can’t root for the Thunder because of the foul baiting: “As a fan of the game, I just want to see the game respected. There are times where I watch OKC play, I don’t feel like they respect the process of the game.”
